name: SimERP.docx
description:
Teams Module – Developer Requirement Document

1. Module Overview

The Teams Module manages Reporting Manager based teams within departments.

Each team represents a group of employees reporting to a specific Reporting Manager (RM).

Teams are used for:

department organization

employee grouping

allocation visibility (Phase 2)

2. Module Navigation

Navigation Structure:

Teams   ├── Teams   └── Weekly Updates

This document covers:

Teams → Teams



3. Team Structure

Each team contains:

Field

Description

Team Name

Custom team name

Reporting Manager

Employee acting as RM

Department

Department the team belongs to

Color Code

UI identifier

Important rule:

1 Reporting Manager = 1 Team



4. Data Model

Teams Table

Field

Type

team_id

id

team_name

String

department_id

id

reporting_manager_id

id

color_code

String

deleted_at

Timestamp

deleted_by

id

created_by

id

created_at

Timestamp

updated_by

id

updated_at

Timestamp

display_order

number



5. Employee Team Mapping

Employees are NOT stored in the team table.

Employees belong to team through:

employees.reporting_manager_id

Employee query:

SELECT *FROM employeesWHERE reporting_manager_id = team.reporting_manager_id

Employee count:

COUNT(employees)



6. Department Based Visibility

Users only see teams belonging to their department.

Example:

Logged In Department = React

Query:

SELECT * FROM teamsWHERE department_id = React



7. Teams Dashboard View

Each team card should display:

Field

Team Name

Reporting Manager

Employee Count

Color Code

Example:

Testing Team RM: Hardik Metaliya Employees: 8 Color: Green



8. Add Team Flow

User Action:

Click "Add Team"

Form opens.



9. Add Team Fields

Field

Required

Description

Team Name

Yes

Custom team name

Reporting Manager

Yes

Select employee

Department

Yes

Department

Color Code

Optional

UI color

display_order

Yes



Validation:

RM already assigned to another team



10. Edit Team

Editable fields:

Team Name

Reporting Manager

Color Code

Display Order

Restrictions:

If RM changes → team members automatically change.



11. Delete Team

Soft delete recommended.

Instead of delete:

status = inactive

Reason:

keeps historical data

avoids broken references



12. Phase 1 Scope

Developers should implement:

Team listing

Team creation

Team editing

Team soft deletion

RM selection

Color selection

Employee count calculation

RBAC enforcement
